title: Improvements to the Fields pages in Jira Admin - Part 1
description: This first release includes changes that make field management simpler and more efficient for Jira admins, such as a redesigned Fields page (formerly Custom fields) that now shows fields created by Jira or plugins (i.e., System fields). You can also create and add new fields to configuration schemes without leaving the page, and filter and sort fields based on Field category type.
